A Little Introduction

Welcome to Rakhshanda Memorial!
A Non-Profit Organization

Healthy Food

We provide meals via Dastarkhwans, Ramadan ration drives, and our Food ATM, ensuring food security for those in need.

Educational Support

RM supports underprivileged students by providing access to quality education, helping them build brighter futures.

Psychological Health

Through medical camps and awareness campaigns, RM promotes mental health and emotional well-being.

Empowering Communities

Through our Khud Kafeel Project, we empower individuals with education to promote financial independence.

WATCH OUR FEATURE ON SACH NEWS!

Life’s value lies in serving humanity, not in its years.

Join us as Sach News covers Rakhshanda Memorial’s groundbreaking Food ATM initiative!
We are dedicated to making food accessible at lower costs while also providing essential medical and financial assistance to those in need.

Our Impactful Projects

Building a Better Future Together

At RM, we are committed to transforming communities through meaningful initiatives that address essential needs and create sustainable change. Our Ambulance Service ensures swift emergency care for those in need, while the Food ATM provides accessible meal distribution to combat food insecurity. During Ramadan, our Ration Drives & Dastarkhwans support families with essential food supplies, ensuring no one goes hungry. To promote a greener, healthier environment, our Plantation Drives encourage community-wide tree planting efforts. Additionally, we organize Medical Camps to offer free healthcare services to underserved communities. Through Khud Kafeel – Livelihood Project, we empower individuals to achieve financial independence. Each of these initiatives is driven by our mission to uplift communities and create a lasting impact.

We are

Building a Future of Hope

Rakshanda Memorial

Rakhshanda Memorial (RM) is an initiative founded by Tehreem Zaki, dedicated to making a meaningful impact in society. As a non-profit organization, RM provides educational, medical, financial, and food support to underserved communities, striving to create lasting change and uplift those in need.

Vision Statement

Since its inception in Ramadan 2023, RM has been committed to serving humanity with compassion and dedication. Looking ahead, we aspire to expand our efforts, reaching more people and introducing new initiatives that foster positive change. Our ultimate vision is to establish an exemplary psychological care hospital in Pakistan, ensuring accessible mental health support for all.

Mission Statement

RM is driven by a mission to strengthen human connections through acts of kindness and service. We believe that every drop of honesty, effort, and kindness adds to the ocean of national progress. By embracing those in need with warmth and compassion, we strive to become a beacon of hope in difficult times. Through our collective care, we aim to bring peace and support to individuals and communities because "your actions matter". Together, we can foster a culture of resilience and meaningful change.

Latest Causes

RM Ration Drives 25

RM delivered ration packs to deserving families, going door to door.

Details

Food ATM

RM’s Food ATM serves wholesome home cooked meals in only Rupees 100.

Details

Khud Kafeel

RM empowers individuals with small business support to promote financial independence.

Details

Psycological Health

RM provides counseling sessions to support mental well-being, helping individuals manage stress and anxiety in a safe and compassionate environment.

Details

Food ATM
